channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Public Footpath improperly marked/diverted, 30th April
item.description:
There's supposedly a public footpath here, but it is either blocked due to residents putting up gates or the footpath has been legally diverted and not updated. There's even a public footpath sign post in place but it just points to a resident's gate that says "private no entry".
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Street, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large, deep pothole, likely to cause damage to cars, and a danger to cyclists, 30th April
item.description:
Just after the turning into Fern Court, in the direction of the church
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Down Hatherley Lane, Down Hatherley, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown trees in footpath affecting gardens, 30th April
item.description:
Footpath behind 11, Greenacre Way has large trees growing in it, which are affecting the residents' gardens. PROW map shows : USRN 40103006 Bishops Cleeve Footpath 3 Number ABC3 Type FP What3Words///page.pouch.fire
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 72, Evesham Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Amber Light not working, 30th April
item.description:
On pedestrian crossing, as you approach from the High Street, the Amber light on the traffic light on LHS of road isn't working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 30th April
